name: German Chocolate "Pig Out
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cake mix, 1/3 cup of evaporated milk and melted margarine in a bowl.
2. Spread half of this mixture evenly in the bottom of a 9 x 13-inch cake pan.
3. Bake for 5 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
4. Heat the caramels with 1/3 cup of evaporated milk until they are melted.
5. On top of the baked layer, spread the pecans and chocolate chips.
6. Also add the melted caramel and milk mixture.
7. Spread the remaining half of the cake batter evenly over the top.
8. Bake for another 20 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
